name: Lebkuchen
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Unblanched almonds, chopped and finely ground
4 oz Chopped assorted candied citrus rind
recipeInstructions:
To prepare bars: Heat honey and butter until butter melts. Let cool to lukewarm. Beat in eggs. Beat in lemon peel, juice, almonds and candied fruit. Set aside.
Sift together baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, cloves, and flour; mix well. Add 1 cup at a time to honey mixture. Chill dough for 8 hours.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Pat dough into 2 greased 9-by-13-inch pans; bake until firm and lightly browned, about 15 minutes. Let cool slightly in pan on racks.
While bars are cooling, prepare icing: Blend sugar, lemon juice, vanilla, honey, and water. Glaze bars with icing while still warm. Cut into 1 1/2-by-2-inch rectangles. While icing is still wet, decorate with slivered almonds, maraschino cherries, and green candied fruit. Remove bars from pans and let cool on racks. Store in airtight containers.
Yield: 5 dozen cookies.
